objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=30)
- adx(period=10)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 20
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 20
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 15
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.0
tp_atr_mult: 4.5
description: ATR stop-loss (1.0x) and take-profit (4.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: A combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR aims to improve trading performance by focusing on high momentum stocks while also incorporating trend analysis.

code.validation_error_retry: [SIG001] `for i in range(...)` interdit dans la logique Builder.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] 1. The use of multiple indicators such as RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR may introduce noise and overfit the data. 2. If results are poor (negative return), a simple moving average instead of Donchian Channel could be tested for entry strategy. 3. Parameter adjustments might include adjusting stop-loss distance from ATMs or changing TP/SL ratios.  4. Alternative approach would involve testing different combinations of indicators such as ATR and RSI, Bollinger Bands alone or using an entirely new set of technical analysis tools.
